title: Conflicting max login attempts between spec and changelog
expectedBehavior: The spec and changelog should agree on the maximum login attempts value.
observedBehavior: The spec states max attempts is 3 while the changelog states it was changed to 5.

deterministicFacts.statement: The spec states max login attempts is 3.
The changelog states max attempts was changed to 5.

inference: The two documents contradict each other; clarification is needed to determine the intended value.
